Small and Big Tags

Expected behavior:

  • <small> should remain smaller in both modes.
  • <big> should remain larger in both modes.
  • This should not depend on the Publisher font sizes toggle.

This is normal text.

This is small text inside a small block. This is big text inside a big block.

Nested double small: this should be very small if supported safely.

This is a paragraph of normal text containing a small section and a big section within the same line.
